title: Child-Issue Migration Manifest
description: Records the disposition of every migrated child-repository issue into PPW. Validates data/migration/child-issue-migration-manifest.json.

manifestDate.description: ISO 8601 date this manifest was generated.

generatedBy.description: Agent or process that generated this manifest.

sourceDocument.description: Path to the source inventory document this manifest was derived from.

targetRepository.description: owner/repo of the PPW repository receiving migrated issues.

dispositions.description: Human-readable definitions for each supported disposition value.

closureNote.description: Standing note about how closure instructions should be applied.

issues.description: One record per migrated child-repository issue.

sourceRepo.description: owner/repo of the child repository this issue originates from.

sourceIssue.description: Issue number in the source repository.

sourceTitle.description: Original issue title in the source repository.

sourceUrl.description: Full URL to the issue in the source repository.

sourceLabels.description: Labels on the issue in the source repository.

targetLabels.description: Suggested labels for the corresponding PPW issue.

sourceMilestone.description: Milestone name in the source repository.

issueKind.description: Nature of the issue: implementation work or milestone tracking.

disposition.description: How this issue is handled: created as a new PPW issue, folded into an existing one, or deferred.

targetPpwIssue.description: PPW issue number this maps to. Null if the PPW issue has not been created yet.

targetPpwIssueUrl.description: Full URL to the PPW issue. Null if targetPpwIssue is null.

targetMilestone.description: PPW milestone this issue's work belongs to.

rationale.description: Explanation of why this disposition was chosen.

closureInstruction.description: Instruction for when and how to close the source issue.
